name: snarl-sopi-backend
description: Snarl & Sopi backend v4.92 — machine detail now pushes a history entry, so the iOS swipe-back gesture / Safari back arrow returns to the machines list; replaces (no stacking) when switching between machines, and renders without duplicating history on back/forward and on deep-link load. Builds on v4.91 #machine/<code> routing.
